rules.rule: conflict_kind enum: specification-conflict | procedure-conflict | warning-conflict | troubleshooting-conflict
conflicting_refs MUST be a list of >= 2 distinct fingerprint_ids or canonical entity ids
severity enum: informational | minor | major | blocking
trust_composition MUST be recorded (counts of reviewer-approved / review-required / unresolved sources)
conflict surfacing is fail-closed: blocking conflicts MUST gate downstream canonical promotion
